evals.prompt: Audit this existing React dashboard and give me the highest-impact UI fixes without rewriting the app.
evals.expected_output: A concise audit covering hierarchy, spacing/layout, color/surface, states/accessibility, responsiveness, and prioritized fixes.

evals.prompt: Build a premium SaaS landing page hero and feature section for an AI operations product. Keep it executive and not flashy.
evals.expected_output: Frontend guidance or implementation that avoids generic AI-purple styling, includes responsive layout, real states where relevant, and credible executive copy.

evals.prompt: Polish this Tailwind component so it feels less AI-generated and more product-grade.
evals.expected_output: Targeted component improvements for typography, spacing, states, accessibility, and dependency-safe implementation.
